channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Some software stocks may be even less desirable in a rebounding market
item.description: Some recent developments suggest the beleaguered software group of stocks may be coming back into favor, as I noted a couple weeks ago following positive responses to both Snowflake and Elastic.
item.dc:creator: Tiernan Ray, Fast Company

item.title: If Congress won’t regulate AI, Scott Wiener believes California must
item.description: Last summer, Scott Wiener found himself in an uncomfortable position for any California Democrat: openly quarreling with Nancy Pelosi and garnering support from Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: Federal appeals court blocks push to delay January TikTok ban
item.description: A federal appeals court in Washington denied a request from the social platform TikTok that would effectively delay the ban of the app next month. The rejection comes after the company sought to stop the ban Monday, asking the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Trump hosts Apple CEO at Mar-a-Lago as big tech leaders continue outreach to president-elect
item.description: Donald Trump is hosting Apple CEO Tim Cook for a Friday evening dinner at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago resort.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: DoorDash is stepping up driver ID checks. Here’s why
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Musk knocks SEC over settlement offer in probe
item.description: Tech mogul Elon Musk criticized the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Thursday over a settlement offer in the agency’s probe into his 2022 purchase of Twitter, the social platform now known as X.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: US updates a science and technology pact with China to reflect growing rivalry and security threats
item.description: The U.S. has updated a decades-old science and technology agreement with China to reflect their growing rivalry for technological dominance.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Discover’s hybrid cloud journey pays off
item.description: Discover Financial Services has moved aggressively to the cloud in 2024 with a migration strategy focused on retaining hybrid flexibility and making the most of cloud elasticity.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Chicago flunks cloud economics
item.description: The city of Chicago has devised a brilliant plan to jack up its cloud computing tax from 9% to 11%. As someone who has worked in tech for decades, I’ve seen this movie before, and (spoiler alert) it didn’t have a happy ending. This is not a diatribe against taxes; taxes are not the issue here.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump backs dockworkers' union preparing to strike over automation
item.description: President-elect Trump backed the dockworkers' union as it prepares for a strike over automation in mid-January — right before the former president is set to return to the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Trump’s pick of David Sacks as AI and crypto czar shows how cozy his White House will be with Silicon Valley
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s approach to crypto is becoming clearer with the appointment of entrepreneur David Sacks as Trump’s “White House A.I. & Crypto Czar”—signaling a shift in how the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk wants to turn SpaceX's Starbase site into a Texas city
item.description: Billionaire Elon Musk 's company on Thursday sent a letter to local officials requesting an election to turn what it calls Starbase — the South Texas site where SpaceX builds and launches its massive Starship rockets — into an incorporated city.
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: No support or updates for Windows 11 on machines not meeting minimum hardware requirements, says Microsoft
item.description: Microsoft has offered a miniscule concession to users determined to install Windows 11 on PCs that don’t meet its minimum hardware requirements: you will be able to do it, but on your own head be it should things go wrong.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 4 key AI risks to address when contracting services or products
item.description: With the rapid rise of AI, especially GenAI, clients are evaluating risks from partner or vendor use of AI. CIOs and organizations are advised to consider how these risks may impact their operations and security and create contractual terms to address them.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Network World’s Best of Enterprise Network 2024 award winners
item.description: In many ways, networking is a mature, stable industry, based on established technologies like Wi-Fi and Ethernet, which just celebrated its 50th anniversary.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
